zh.lifeSummary: 當Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)於1415年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)18歲，母親(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)18歲。他於1438年與Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1487年在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)于1415年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)18岁，母亲(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)18岁。他于1438年与Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1487年在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾登斯可雷。

nameMeanings.name: GRIERSON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Kirkcudbrightshire): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier , a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ), + son. Compare Greer , with which some variation is evident among the early bearers, and compare Gregor and McGregor .

History: A Scottish family by the name of Grierson claim descent from Gilbert, a son of Malcolm MacGregor (died 1374), 11th Lord of MacGregor. Gilbert was known as both MacGregor and Gregorson. In 1400 he was granted lands by the Earl of March in the name Grierson. The numerous northern Irish bearers of the name Greer claim descent from this same Gilbert.

variants.name: Grier
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier, a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ). This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, especially Donegal, Antrim, and Longford.

en.lifeSummary: When Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) was born in 1415, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag), was 18 and his mother, (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate), was 18. He married Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple in 1438, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1487, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) est né en 1415, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag), avait 18 ans et sa mère, (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate), avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple en 1438, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1487, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.Rockhall, Collin, Dumfries, Scotland: Rock Hall, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) 1415 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) 18 und seine Mutter (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) 18. Er hat 1438 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1487 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple nel 1438, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1487, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)が1415年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)は18歳，母(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)は18歳であった。1438年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでMargaret Glendonwyn de Dalrympleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1487年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで72歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)(이)가 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1438년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1487년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple em 1438, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) родился в 1415 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate), 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple в 1438 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1487 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple en 1438, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
